---
name: release-notes-from-history
description: Use this when asked to prepare changelogs, release notes, or project updates for this repository from commits, pull requests, issues, or other recorded history.
---

When drafting release material for this repository:

1. Prefer repository evidence such as commits, pull requests, issues, and merged changes.
2. Use GitHub or git history to gather facts instead of inferring features.
3. Group notes by user-visible outcomes when possible.
4. Call out placeholders or unreleased areas clearly instead of presenting them as shipped functionality.
5. Keep release notes compatible with both the website and the Starlight documentation structure.
